steps.text: I open the examples/example-cpp workspace in VS Code
I open the CodeGraphy extension graph view
I have indexed the workspace

scenarios.name: C++ example renders file nodes and include relationships

steps.text: I see graph nodes
I show no edge types
I can see there are 13 nodes and 0 connections
the graph nodes match the expected files in the examples/example-cpp workspace
I open the Graph Scope
I select edge types
the available edge types are only Include, Calls, Inherits, Contains, Overrides
I select node types
the available C++ node types are only Namespace, Class, Enum, Callable, Method, Alias, Template, Global, Constant, Field, Parameter, Local
the Type node type is not available for the C++ example
I close the Graph Scope
I toggle the Include edge on
I can see there are 13 nodes and 12 connections
src/app.cpp points to src/runner.hpp
src/app.cpp points to src/seed.hpp
src/app.cpp points to src/worker.hpp
src/runner.cpp points to src/runner.hpp
src/runner.hpp points to src/task_queue.hpp
src/runner.hpp points to src/worker.hpp
src/seed.cpp points to src/seed.hpp
src/seed.hpp points to src/task.hpp
src/task.cpp points to src/task.hpp
src/task_queue.hpp points to src/task.hpp
src/worker.cpp points to src/worker.hpp
src/worker.hpp points to src/task.hpp
README.md is an orphan node
CMakeLists.txt is an orphan node
.gitignore is an orphan node

scenarios.name: C++ graph scope exposes supported node types

steps.text: I show only the Contains edge type
I show only the File and Namespace node types
I can see there are 14 nodes and 1 connection
the visible graph includes the Namespace node taskrunner from src/task.hpp
src/task.hpp points to src/task.hpp#taskrunner:namespace
I show only the File and Class node types
I can see there are 17 nodes and 4 connections
the visible graph includes the Class node Task from src/task.hpp
the visible graph includes the Class node Worker from src/worker.hpp
the visible graph includes the Class node ConsoleWorker from src/worker.hpp
the visible graph includes the Class node TaskRunner from src/runner.hpp
I show only the File and Enum node types
I can see there are 15 nodes and 2 connections
the visible graph includes the Enum node Priority from src/task.hpp
the visible graph includes the Enum node TaskStatus from src/task.hpp
I show only the File and Callable node types
I can see there are 17 nodes and 4 connections
the visible graph includes the Callable node main from src/app.cpp
the visible graph includes the Callable node make_task from src/seed.cpp
the visible graph includes the Callable node seed_tasks from src/seed.cpp
the visible graph includes the Callable node priority_name from src/task.cpp
I show only the File and Method node types
I can see there are 30 nodes and 17 connections
the visible graph includes the Method node TaskRunner::run from src/runner.cpp
the visible graph includes the Method node ConsoleWorker::execute from src/worker.cpp
the visible graph includes the Method node Task::mark_completed from src/task.cpp
I show only the File and Alias node types
I can see there are 16 nodes and 3 connections
the visible graph includes the Alias node TaskId from src/task.hpp
the visible graph includes the Alias node TaskList from src/seed.hpp
the visible graph includes the Alias node PendingTaskQueue from src/task_queue.hpp
I show only the File and Template node types
I can see there are 14 nodes and 1 connection
the visible graph includes the Template node TaskQueue from src/task_queue.hpp
I show only the File and Global node types
I can see there are 14 nodes and 1 connection
the visible graph includes the Global node next_task_id from src/seed.cpp
I show only the File and Constant node types
I can see there are 15 nodes and 2 connections
the visible graph includes the Constant node kInitialStatus from src/task.cpp
the visible graph includes the Constant node kDefaultPriority from src/seed.cpp
I show only the File and Field node types
I can see there are 20 nodes and 7 connections
the visible graph includes the Field node queue_ from src/runner.hpp
the visible graph includes the Field node worker_ from src/runner.hpp
the visible graph includes the Field node items_ from src/task_queue.hpp
the visible graph includes the Field node status_ from src/task.hpp
I show only the File and Parameter node types
I can see there are 24 nodes and 11 connections
the visible graph includes the Parameter node task from src/runner.cpp
the visible graph includes the Parameter node worker from src/runner.cpp
the visible graph includes the Parameter node priority from src/seed.cpp
I show only the File and Local node types
I can see there are 24 nodes and 11 connections
the visible graph includes the Local node completed from src/runner.cpp
the visible graph includes the Local node tasks from src/seed.cpp
the visible graph includes the Local node id from src/seed.cpp

scenarios.name: C++ graph scope exposes semantic edge relationships

steps.text: I show no edge types
I show only the File, Namespace, Class, Enum, Callable, Method, Alias, Template, Global, Constant, Field, Parameter and Local node types
I can see there are 77 nodes and 0 connections
I toggle the Contains edge on
I can see there are 77 nodes and 64 connections
src/task.hpp points to src/task.hpp#Task:class
src/task.hpp points to src/task.hpp#Priority:enum
src/task.hpp points to src/task.hpp#TaskId:alias
src/task_queue.hpp points to src/task_queue.hpp#TaskQueue:template
src/runner.hpp points to src/runner.hpp#TaskRunner:class
src/runner.hpp points to src/runner.hpp#queue_:field
src/seed.cpp points to src/seed.cpp#next_task_id:global
src/seed.cpp points to src/seed.cpp#kDefaultPriority:constant
src/runner.cpp points to src/runner.cpp#completed:local
I show only the Calls edge type
I can see there are 77 nodes and 15 connections
the visible graph shows main in src/app.cpp calling seed_tasks in src/seed.hpp
the visible graph shows main in src/app.cpp calling TaskRunner::enqueue in src/runner.hpp
the visible graph shows TaskRunner::run in src/runner.cpp calling Worker::execute in src/worker.hpp
the visible graph shows ConsoleWorker::execute in src/worker.cpp calling priority_name in src/task.hpp
the visible graph shows seed_tasks in src/seed.cpp calling make_task in src/seed.cpp
I show only the Inherits edge type
I can see there are 77 nodes and 1 connection
the visible graph shows ConsoleWorker in src/worker.hpp inheriting from Worker in src/worker.hpp
I show only the Overrides edge type
I can see there are 77 nodes and 1 connection
the visible graph shows ConsoleWorker::execute in src/worker.hpp overriding Worker::execute in src/worker.hpp
I show only the Include edge type
I can see there are 77 nodes and 12 connections
src/app.cpp points to src/runner.hpp
